title: Alliance Client Pack
description: This modpack adds additional functionality to the Alliance Minecraft server. Full of optimizations, QOL changes, and fixes.
body:
## About

This modpack is for the Alliance at GSU Minecraft server. It adds additional functionality for clients that wish to use mods. This modpack works completely on its own for signleplayer and includes many optimization mods to make Minecraft run more smoothly. In addition to optimizations this pack has a number of GUI mods that give the player additional information.

## Gameplay Changes

### [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)

This mod adds support for emotes, additional player customization, and social features like friends lists and hosting a world without a server.

### [JourneyMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap)

Adds a minimap and fullscreen map to the game along with options to create waypoints and see other players on the server.

### [Ping Wheel](https://modrinth.com/mod/ping-wheel)

Allows players to "ping" or mark a location for other players to see.

### [Autoswitch](https://modrinth.com/mod/autoswitch)

Automatically selects the best tool and places it in your hand.

### [Bridging Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/bridging-mod)

Adds the bridging functionality from Bedrock to Java along with a few added QOL changes.

### [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify)

Adds full controller support to the game. Remappable buttons, vibration support, on screen button guides, and more are included.

*All other mods are linked in the changelog*

## Performance

This pack includes a variety of performance-focused mods. **The modpack will run BETTER than vanilla** so if you have older hardware or if you’d like to use a higher quality resource pack it's highly encourage you use this pack. Please note that computers from over 8 years ago may run into issues running this pack due to hardware compatibility.

## Resource Packs

The following resource packs are included in the modpack. **Enable them in this order!**

### [Essential UI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/essentialui)

Changes Minecraft's UI to match the Essential Mod.

### [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)

Includes extra tweaks and changes that the server resource pack leaves out.

## Pack Compatibility

### OS

✅Windows 10/11 | ✅MacOS | ☢️Windows 7/8 | ☢️Linux | ⛔Mobile/Console

### Game Versions

✅Minecraft Java 1.21 | ⛔Minecraft Java 1.0.0-1.20.6 | ⛔Minecraft Bedrock

### Java Versions

✅Java 21 | ⛔Java 1-20

### Key

✅ = Compatible | ☢️ = Untested | ⛔️ = Uncompatible

## How to Install Modpack

[Modrinth]([https://atlauncher.com/downloads](https://modrinth.com/app))(Recommended)

1. Click the search icon on the left sidebar
2. Search "Alliance Client Pack" and click install
3. Click the library icon on the left sidebar
4. Hover over the Alliance modpack and click the play button

[Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/)/[MultiMC](https://multimc.org/)/[ATLauncher](https://atlauncher.com/downloads)

1. Click "add instance" or "packs"
2. Select the Modrinth tab from the left
3. Search "Alliance Client Pack" and select the pack
4. Click OK
